Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.debug

Interface FlixelDebugDrawable

All Known Implementing Classes:
FlixelBar, FlixelObject, FlixelSprite, FlixelSpriteGroup, FlixelText
public interface FlixelDebugDrawable
Interface for objects that can draw a debug bounding box in the FlixelDebugOverlay. Any class that implements this will automatically appear when visual debug drawing is enabled, without being hard-coded into the overlay.

FlixelObject implements this by default, using collision state to pick an appropriate color. Custom objects (including Box2D bodies) can implement this interface to provide their own debug visualization.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    float[]
    getDebugBoundingBoxColor()
    Returns the RGBA color for this object's debug bounding box as a 4-element array: [r, g, b, a].
    default float
    getDebugDrawX(FlixelCamera camera)
    X position of the debug box in the same world space as FlixelCamera projection during draw (includes scroll-factor / parallax).
    default float
    getDebugDrawY(FlixelCamera camera)
    Y position of the debug box in the same world space as FlixelCamera projection during draw.
    float
    getDebugHeight()
    Height of the bounding box in world pixels.
    float
    getDebugWidth()
    Width of the bounding box in world pixels.
    float
    getDebugX()
    X position of the bounding box in world space.
    float
    getDebugY()
    Y position of the bounding box in world space.

  • Method Details

    • getDebugX

      float getDebugX()
      X position of the bounding box in world space.

    • getDebugY

      float getDebugY()
      Y position of the bounding box in world space.

    • getDebugWidth

      float getDebugWidth()
      Width of the bounding box in world pixels.

    • getDebugHeight

      float getDebugHeight()
      Height of the bounding box in world pixels.

    • getDebugDrawX

      default float getDebugDrawX(FlixelCamera camera)
      X position of the debug box in the same world space as FlixelCamera projection during draw (includes scroll-factor / parallax). Defaults to getDebugX().
      Parameters:
      camera - The game camera used for this debug pass.

    • getDebugDrawY

      default float getDebugDrawY(FlixelCamera camera)
      Y position of the debug box in the same world space as FlixelCamera projection during draw. Defaults to getDebugY().
      Parameters:
      camera - The game camera used for this debug pass.

    • getDebugBoundingBoxColor

      float[] getDebugBoundingBoxColor()
      Returns the RGBA color for this object's debug bounding box as a 4-element array: [r, g, b, a]. Implementations should return a cached array rather than allocating every frame.
